label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation)
FIRST: The date of incorporation is
rationale: Date the original articles of incorporation were filed with the SOS. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-11 (where it represents the same concept on the §1404 dissolution path) and MLLP-6A (restated certificate). The form's wording 'date of incorporation' is shorthand for the same primitive.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date that the dissolution was authorized is
rationale: Date the dissolution was authorized by the requisite incorporators/initial directors. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-11.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The effective date of the articles of dissolution (if other than the date of filing of the articles of dissolution) is
rationale: Optional delayed effective date; blank means effective on filing. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-11.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: [ ] None of the corporation's shares have been issued.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive radio option for dissolution.early_dissolution_basis='no_shares_issued' (per 13-C MRSA §1401.1, this is one of the two statutory bases for incorporator/initial-director dissolution). Form text 'X one box only' establishes XOR with Check Box5.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: [ ] The corporation has not commenced business.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive radio option for dissolution.early_dissolution_basis='not_commenced_business' (per 13-C MRSA §1401.2, the second statutory basis).

label_verbatim: DATED ___
Signer slot 1 — (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for the first signer — Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. Multi-slot extension of filing.signer.* (filing.signer_N.* indexed list when the form provides multiple parallel signer slots) — same pattern as MLLC-5A. Capacity is typically 'Incorporator' or 'Initial Director' per the form footer.

label_verbatim: Signer slot 2 — (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for the second signer. The form footer requires 'a majority of the incorporators or initial directors' — when there are 2-3 originators, both slots are typically populated.
